name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2)
notes:
This building block detects when a Mosquito service creates registry keys for persistence.

The malware adds "local_update_check" value to HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?\\software\\microsoft\\windows\\currentversion\\run\\local_update_check') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Mosquito Registry Installation (2) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed
AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES ('.*?\\software\\microsoft\\windows\\currentversion\\run\\local_update_check') AQL filter query
